content.en:
Under the stars.

Ye Tian was shuttling, preparing to go to a treasure place, but suddenly a sense of crisis came.

"Dangerous!"

Ye Tian's expression was solemn.

As a Heavenly Monarch who has practiced the arithmetic of the great gods, even if he does not urge the arithmetic of the great gods, his perception of danger is also very strong.

Immediately, Ye Tian urged the Great God to do arithmetic, and soon sensed that someone was ambushing him.

However, he couldn't figure out who was targeting him, after all, the big universe had been blocked, and he couldn't count other people's affairs at all, so he naturally couldn't count it.

But if you calculate that you are in danger, you can still do it.

"Looks like someone is trying to assassinate me!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He did not panic, but continued to shuttle very calmly.

In addition, he cast the Great Immortal Technique, and all kinds of defensive supernatural powers were superimposed, and the defensive supernatural powers could be stacked and cast, without restrictions, unlike the attack supernatural powers that could not be stacked.

Suddenly.

A dark light appeared in the starry sky.

This dark light instantly pierced through time and space, slashing towards Ye Tian at an incredible speed.

"Not good!"

Ye Tian sensed the attack, but he couldn't dodge it, the other party's speed was too fast, surpassing everything.

Ye Tian wanted to dodge such an attack, unless he cultivated the chaotic divine power of the space-time transfer technique to the Xiaocheng realm, he couldn't dodge it at all.

The one who shot at him must be a powerful Heavenly Monarch, or even a Heavenly Monarch.

"Blood River Immortality!"

"Void Heaven Dao Body!"

Ye Tian urged in unison.

In an instant, a river of blood descended.

And the blood river was penetrated by the dark light in an instant, and even Ye Tian's body was penetrated, and a Chaos Treasure defensive armor on his body was directly annihilated and shattered, and his body was almost shattered and annihilated.

However, under the triple protection of the Blood River Immortal Technique, the Extreme Level Great Immortal Technique, and the Void Heaven Dao Body, Ye Tian was almost fine, and his body condensed again.

"Run!"

Ye Tian used the space-time transfer technique and quickly shuttled away.

At the same time, he began to summon Peng Yu Tianjun, informing the other party that he had been attacked.

Distance.

A Heavenly Monarch in a black robe and a mask was chasing after him, but Ye Tian was prepared, this Heavenly Monarch couldn't catch up with him at all.

After a while, the Heavenly Monarch gave up and began to flee.

If he chased after him any longer, once Pengyu Tianjun arrived, he probably wouldn't be able to escape.

Not long after, Pengyu Tianjun arrived, and when he saw Ye Tian unharmed, he immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

"Daozi, it's okay if you're fine, who assassinated you?"

Peng Yu Tianjun asked.

"I don't know!" Ye Tian shook his head, "I only know that person used a dark light method, which penetrated in an instant, if I didn't have a means to save my life, I'm afraid I would have died!"

In fact, Ye Tian already knew about the other party's body, and the copying talent directly probed the other party's situation.

But it is impossible for Ye Tian to tell Peng Yu Tianjun the actual situation, otherwise there is no way to explain.

The person who attacked Ye Tian was a Heavenly Monarch on the Heavenly Monarch List, the Black Tower Heavenly Monarch, ranked 974th on the Heavenly Monarch List, which was considered the bottom of the Heavenly Monarch List, but his strength was very strong and strong, and Ye Tian couldn't beat it for the time being.

"Daozi, where were you attacked?"

Peng Yu Tianjun asked.

Ye Tian took Peng Yu Tianjun to the place where he was attacked, and Peng Yu Tianjun sensed the energy fluctuations around him, so as to speculate on the other party's magical means.

"It's the Chaos Divine Power - Ziji Dark Light, ranked 572nd on the Chaos Divine Power List, the other party's Sub Extreme Dark Light may have been practiced to the Dacheng realm, and the Heavenly Monarch who can have such a powerful Chaos Divine Power, even if the foundation is poor, I am afraid that he can also approach the Heavenly Monarch level of the Heavenly Monarch List. What's more, the Heavenly Monarch who can be qualified to practice the Chaos Divine Power is unlikely to have a weak foundation, so the person who makes the move must be a Heavenly Monarch Rank Heavenly Monarch!"

After Peng Yu Tianjun finished speaking, he looked at Ye Tian with a very surprised look.

A Heavenly Monarch attacked Ye Tian, but Ye Tian was fine.

It's incredible!

You must know that the Heavenly Monarch List, the Heavenly Monarch attacks the powerful Heavenly Monarch who has not entered the Heavenly Monarch List, and it can be killed in seconds with one move.

And not long after Ye Tiancai broke through to the Heavenly Monarch level, his strength could not be too strong, how could he save his life under the attack of the Heavenly Monarch?

"Could it be that he used the life-saving thing given by the Dao Ancestor?"

Peng Yu Tianjun guessed.

"Daozi, there are at least ten Heavenly Monarchs in the great universe who have cultivated the sub-extremely dark light on the bright side, and they dare not guarantee that the other party is the kind of mysterious Heavenly Monarch who hides the sub-extremely dark light, so they can't confirm their identity!"

"Understood!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Just a supernatural power can't explain anything at all, for example, he has practiced so many chaotic supernatural powers, and others don't know.

If you rely on a supernatural power to suspect others, it is easy to cause trouble for the Void Heaven Temple, and even cause hostility from other forces.

"Senior Brother Pengyu, thank you!"

Ye Tian thanked.

"Daozi is polite, but it's been too dangerous recently, Daozi pays more attention to safety, and it's best to retreat and cultivate in the Void Heaven Palace. Peng Yu Tianjun reminded.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently, Peng Yu Tianjun left here, and Ye Tian did not return to the Void Heaven Palace, but used the space-time transfer technique, constantly changing directions, making it impossible for people to easily grasp their whereabouts.

And his purpose remains the same, he still goes to those treasure places to collect resources.

-----------

The other side.

The Celestial Monarch of the Black Tower arrived at a stronghold of the Dark God and met with one of the Dark God Society's masters.

"Blacktower, is the mission complete?"

The Darkgod Guild Controller asked.

"Failed!" Heita Tianjun said: "We underestimated the demon of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao, his strength may not be strong, but the means of saving his life are too terrifying. He actually practiced the Great Immortal Technique, but the Great Immortal Technique at the extreme level, and he also practiced the Blood River Immortal Technique, which was already at the peak of the entry, and it would not be long before he could enter the Xiaocheng realm. And his physique is very strong, and it is impossible to know what physique it is. In addition, he will also have chaos supernatural powers such as time and space, much like the space-time transfer technique, but he can't guarantee it. I can't catch up with him, and I can't kill him in one hit. "

"What, the Great Immortal Technique, the Blood River Immortal Technique, and the Time and Space Shifting Technique, how afraid of death is this Ten Thousand Laws Dao Son, he actually practiced all the life-saving supernatural powers!"

The Dark God Guild's rulers were surprised.

You must know that a person is proficient in one or two Chaos Divine Powers at most, after all, his energy is limited, and if he wants to practice a Chaos Divine Ability, the price he pays is too heavy, after all, it is too harsh to meet the conditions for meeting the Chaos Divine Powers.

Even the most talented peerless Tianjiao didn't dare to try to cultivate multiple Chaos Divine Powers, and the price paid was enough to bankrupt the True Ancestor!

Therefore, he felt that Ye Tian would only have a few chaotic supernatural powers and a few great supernatural powers, but Ye Tian chose all the places of these supernatural powers to save his life, how afraid of death was!

However, they never expected that Ye Tian was a hanger, and with his talent for copying, he could constantly copy other people's talents and fuse and improve his own talents.

And Ye Tian, many of Ye Tian's talents have all been upgraded to the super god level, and they can be combined at will, so they can naturally cultivate all the chaotic supernatural powers.

But the price Ye Tian paid was not understood by others, after all, for a long time, he copied and fused hundreds of millions of talents, and every fusion was a whipping of the soul and body!

This is equivalent to a long period of torture, and the price is very bearable.

"Give up the plan to assassinate Wanfa Daozi for the time being!"

The Dark God Guild controller said helplessly.

"Yes!"

The Black Tower Heavenly Monarch replied.
